IF CR NOT > ZERO
       EVALUATE TRUE ALSO TRUE ALSO TRUE ALSO TRUE
          WHEN COMBAT-DAN    = TAU-R-JAN    ALSO
               COMBAT-AC3DIR = TAU-R-DEPDIR ALSO
               COMBAT-CCOCOM = TAU-R-CCOCOM ALSO
               COMBAT-CCOIFP = TAU-R-CCOIFP
             CONTINUE
          WHEN OTHER
             IF PARM = 'M'
                CALL 'EFITAUX2' USING
                   COMBAT-DAN
                   COMBAT-AC3DIR
                   COMBAT-CCOCOM
                   COMBAT-CCOIFP
                   COMBAT-CCPPER
                   CR RC
                   ZES
                   ON EXCEPTION MOVE 24 TO CR MOVE 01 TO RC
                END-CALL
             ELSE
                CALL 'FMSTAU2' USING
                   COMBAT-DAN
                   COMBAT-AC3DIR
                   COMBAT-CCOCOM
                   COMBAT-CCOIFP
                   CR RC
                   ZES
                   ON EXCEPTION MOVE 24 TO CR MOVE 01 TO RC
                END-CALL
                MOVE ZESTAUX TO TAU-R-ROL1
                MOVE TAU-R-ROL1 TO ZESTAUX
             END-IF
             MOVE ZESTAUX TO TAU-E-AN
             MOVE ZESTAUX TO TAU-D-DEP
             MOVE ZESTAUX TO TAU-C-COM
             MOVE ZESTAUX TO TAU-R-ROL
       END-EVALUATE
       MOVE COMBAT-AIDFIC      TO BASEB-CLE
                                  COTISB-CLE
       MOVE COMBAT-ANUPRO      TO BASEB-ANUPRO
                                  COTISB-ANUPRO
       MOVE COMBAT-CCOBNB      TO BASEB-ACODB
                                  COTISB-ACODB
       MOVE 'I'                TO BASEB-IMPOT
                                  COTISB-IMPOT
       MOVE 'BN'               TO BASEB-GNEXPL
                                  COTISB-GNEXPL
       MOVE TAU-R-TAUCOM-B     TO BASEB-TAUCOM
                                  COTISB-TAUCOM
       MOVE TAU-D-TAUDEP-B     TO BASEB-TAUDEP
                                  COTISB-TAUDEP
       MOVE TAU-D-PTBTAS       TO BASEB-TAUTAS
                                  COTISB-TAUTAS
       MOVE TAU-R-TAUSYNDSFP-B TO BASEB-TAUSYN
                                  COTISB-TAUSYN
       MOVE TAU-R-TAUCUDFPVN-B TO BASEB-TAUCU
                                  COTISB-TAUCU
       MOVE TAU-R-TAUTSE-B     TO BASEB-TAUTSEN
                                  COTISB-TAUTSEN
       MOVE TAU-R-PTBTGP       TO BASEB-TAUTSEN
                                  COTISB-TAUTSEN
       MOVE TAU-R-PTBGEM       TO BASEB-TAUGEM
                                  COTISB-TAUGEM
       MOVE TAU-C-PBBOMP       TO BASEB-TAUOM1
                                  COTISB-TAUOM1
       MOVE TAU-C-PBBOMA       TO BASEB-TAUOM1
                                  COTISB-TAUOM1
       MOVE TAU-C-PBBOMB       TO BASEB-TAUOM1
                                  COTISB-TAUOM1
       MOVE TAU-C-PBBOMC       TO BASEB-TAUOM1
                                  COTISB-TAUOM1
       MOVE TAU-C-PBBOMD       TO BASEB-TAUOM1
                                  COTISB-TAUOM1
       MOVE TAU-C-PBBOME       TO BASEB-TAUOM1
                                  COTISB-TAUOM1
       MOVE COMBAT-MBACOM      TO BASEB-BBCOM
                                  COTISB-BBCOM
       MOVE COMBAT-MBADEP      TO BASEB-BBDEP
                                  COTISB-BBDEP
       MOVE COMBAT-MBASYN      TO BASEB-BBSYN
                                  COTISB-BBSYN
       MOVE COMBAT-MBACU       TO BASEB-BBCU
                                  COTISB-BBCU
       MOVE COMBAT-MBAGE3      TO BASEB-BBGEM
                                  COTISB-BBGEM
       MOVE COMBAT-MBATA3      TO BASEB-BBTAS
                                  COTISB-BBTAS
       MOVE COMBAT-MBBT13   TO BASEB-BBTSEN
                                  COTISB-BBTSEN
       MOVE COMBAT-MBBT13   TO BASEB-BBTSEN
                                  COTISB-BBTSEN
       PERFORM VARYING IND FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL IND > 6
          MOVE COMBAT-GTAUOM TO BASEB-GTAUOM
                                     COTISB-GTAUOM
          MOVE COMBAT-MBAOM  TO BASEB-BBTEOM
                                     COTISB-BBTEOM
       END-PERFORM
       COMPUTE COTISB-COTICOM     ROUNDED =
               COTISB-BBCOM * COTISB-TAUCOM / 100
       COMPUTE COTISB-COTIDEP     ROUNDED =
               COTISB-BBDEP * COTISB-TAUDEP / 100
       COMPUTE COTISB-COTISYN     ROUNDED =
               COTISB-BBSYN * COTISB-TAUSYN / 100
       COMPUTE COTISB-COTICU      ROUNDED =
               COTISB-BBCU  * COTISB-TAUCU / 100
       COMPUTE COTISB-MCOGE3      ROUNDED =
               COTISB-BBGEM  * COTISB-TAUGEM / 100
       COMPUTE COTISB-MCOTA3      ROUNDED =
               COTISB-BBTAS  * COTISB-TAUTAS / 100
       COMPUTE COTISB-COTITSEN ROUNDED =
               COTISB-BBTSEN * COTISB-TAUTSEN / 100
       COMPUTE COTISB-COTITSEN ROUNDED =
               COTISB-BBTSEN * COTISB-TAUTSEN / 100
       COMPUTE COTISB-MCBTSA      ROUNDED =
               COTISB-COTITSEN + COTISB-COTITSEN +
               COTISB-MCOTA3
       PERFORM VARYING IND FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL IND > 6
          EVALUATE BASEB-GTAUOM
             WHEN '  '
                MOVE ZERO TO COTISB-COTIS-OM
             WHEN 'P '
                COMPUTE COTISB-COTIS-OM ROUNDED =
                        COTISB-BBTEOM * COTISB-TAUOM1
                                           / 100
             WHEN ' P'
                COMPUTE COTISB-COTIS-OM ROUNDED =
                        COTISB-BBTEOM * COTISB-TAUOM1
                                           / 100
             WHEN 'RA'
                COMPUTE COTISB-COTIS-OM ROUNDED =
                        COTISB-BBTEOM * COTISB-TAUOM1
                                           / 100
             WHEN 'RB'
                COMPUTE COTISB-COTIS-OM ROUNDED =
                        COTISB-BBTEOM * COTISB-TAUOM1
                                           / 100
             WHEN 'RC'
                COMPUTE COTISB-COTIS-OM ROUNDED =
                        COTISB-BBTEOM * COTISB-TAUOM1
                                           / 100
             WHEN 'RD'
                COMPUTE COTISB-COTIS-OM ROUNDED =
                        COTISB-BBTEOM * COTISB-TAUOM1
                                           / 100
             WHEN 'RE'
                COMPUTE COTISB-COTIS-OM ROUNDED =
                        COTISB-BBTEOM * COTISB-TAUOM1
                                           / 100
             WHEN OTHER CONTINUE
          END-EVALUATE
       END-PERFORM
       MOVE COMBAT-MVLTIM TO COTISB-COTIS-OMI
       MOVE 0 TO W-TOTCOTOM
       PERFORM VARYING IND FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL IND > 7
          ADD COTISB-COTIS-OM TO W-TOTCOTOM
       END-PERFORM
       ADD COTISB-COTIS-OMI     TO W-TOTCOTOM
       COMPUTE W-TOTCOT3 = COTISB-COTICOM + COTISB-COTIDEP +
                           COTISB-COTICU + COTISB-MCOGE3
       COMPUTE W-TOTCOT8 = W-TOTCOTOM  + COTISB-COTISYN +
                           COTISB-MCOTA3
       COMPUTE W-TOTCOT9 = COTISB-COTITSEN +
                           COTISB-COTITSEN
       COMPUTE COTISB-FA300  ROUNDED = W-TOTCOT3 * W-F300ARN
       COMPUTE W-FRAIS       ROUNDED = W-TOTCOT3 * W-F300FRS
       COMPUTE COTISB-FN300          = W-FRAIS - COTISB-FA300
       COMPUTE COTISB-FA800  ROUNDED = W-TOTCOT8  * W-F800ARN
       COMPUTE W-FRAIS       ROUNDED = W-TOTCOT8  * W-F800FRS
       COMPUTE COTISB-FN800          = W-FRAIS - COTISB-FA800
       COMPUTE COTISB-FA900  ROUNDED = W-TOTCOT9  * W-F900ARN
       COMPUTE W-FRAIS       ROUNDED = W-TOTCOT9  * W-F900FRS
       COMPUTE COTISB-FN900          = W-FRAIS - COTISB-FA900
       IF COTISB-FA800  < COTISB-FN800
          ADD      1 TO   COTISB-FA800
          SUBTRACT 1 FROM COTISB-FN800
       END-IF
       IF COTISB-FA900  < COTISB-FN900
          ADD      1 TO   COTISB-FA900
          SUBTRACT 1 FROM COTISB-FN900
       END-IF
       MOVE COTISB-CLE         TO RETOURB-AIDFIC
       MOVE COTISB-ANUPRO      TO RETOURB-ANUPRO
       MOVE COTISB-ACODB       TO RETOURB-CCOBNB
       MOVE COTISB-COTICOM     TO RETOURB-MCTCOM
       MOVE COTISB-COTIDEP     TO RETOURB-MCTDEP
       MOVE COTISB-COTISYN     TO RETOURB-MCTSYN
       MOVE COTISB-COTICU      TO RETOURB-MCTCU
       MOVE COTISB-MCOGE3      TO RETOURB-MCOGE3
       MOVE COTISB-MCOTA3      TO RETOURB-MCOTA3
       MOVE COTISB-COTITSEN TO RETOURB-MCBT13
       MOVE COTISB-COTITSEN TO RETOURB-MCBT13
       MOVE COTISB-MCBTSA      TO RETOURB-MCBTSA
       MOVE COTISB-COTIS-OMI   TO RETOURB-MVLTIM
       PERFORM VARYING IND FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL IND > 6
          MOVE COTISB-GTAUOM   TO RETOURB-GTAUOM
          MOVE COTISB-COTIS-OM TO RETOURB-MCTOM
       END-PERFORM
       MOVE W-TOTCOTOM         TO RETOURB-TCTOM
       COMPUTE RETOURB-TCTHFR = W-TOTCOT3 + W-TOTCOT8
                                          + W-TOTCOT9
       MOVE COTISB-FA300       TO RETOURB-MFA300
       MOVE COTISB-FN300       TO RETOURB-MFN300
       MOVE COTISB-FA800       TO RETOURB-MFA800
       MOVE COTISB-FN800       TO RETOURB-MFN800
       MOVE COTISB-FA900       TO RETOURB-MFA900
       MOVE COTISB-FN900       TO RETOURB-MFN900
       COMPUTE RETOURB-TCTFRA = COTISB-FA300 + COTISB-FN300
                              + COTISB-FA800 + COTISB-FN800
                              + COTISB-FA900 + COTISB-FN900
       COMPUTE RETOURB-TCTDU = RETOURB-TCTHFR
                             + RETOURB-MFA300  + RETOURB-MFN300
                             + RETOURB-MFA800  + RETOURB-MFN800
                             + RETOURB-MFA900  + RETOURB-MFN900
    END-IF

'RE' COMPUTE COTISB-COTIS-OM ROUNDED = COTISB-BBTEOM * COTISB-TAUOM1 / 100 WHEN OTHER CONTINUE END-EVALUATE END-PERFORM MOVE COMBAT-MVLTIM TO COTISB-COTIS-OMI MOVE 0 TO W-TOTCOTOM PERFORM VARYING IND FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL IND > 7 ADD COTISB-COTIS-OM TO W-TOTCOTOM END-PERFORM ADD COTISB-COTIS-OMI TO W-TOTCOTOM COMPUTE W-TOTCOT3 = COTISB-COTICOM + COTISB-COTIDEP + COTISB-COTICU + COTISB-MCOGE3 COMPUTE W-TOTCOT8 = W-TOTCOTOM + COTISB-COTISYN + COTISB-MCOTA3 COMPUTE W-TOTCOT9 = COTISB-COTITSEN + COTISB-COTITSEN COMPUTE COTISB-FA300 ROUNDED = W-TOTCOT3 * W-F300ARN COMPUTE W-FRAIS ROUNDED = W-TOTCOT3 * W-F300FRS COMPUTE COTISB-FN300 = W-FRAIS - COTISB-FA300 COMPUTE COTISB-FA800 ROUNDED = W-TOTCOT8 * W-F800ARN COMPUTE W-FRAIS ROUNDED = W-TOTCOT8 * W-F800FRS COMPUTE COTISB-FN800 = W-FRAIS - COTISB-FA800 COMPUTE COTISB-FA900 ROUNDED = W-TOTCOT9 * W-F900ARN COMPUTE W-FRAIS ROUNDED = W-TOTCOT9 * W-F900FRS COMPUTE COTISB-FN900 = W-FRAIS - COTISB-FA900 IF COTISB-FA800 < COTISB-FN800 ADD 1 TO COTISB-FA800 SUBTRACT 1 FROM COTISB-FN800 END-IF IF COTISB-FA900 < COTISB-FN900 ADD 1 TO COTISB-FA900 SUBTRACT 1 FROM COTISB-FN900 END-IF MOVE COTISB-CLE TO RETOURB-AIDFIC MOVE COTISB-ANUPRO TO RETOURB-ANUPRO MOVE COTISB-ACODB TO RETOURB-CCOBNB MOVE COTISB-COTICOM TO RETOURB-MCTCOM MOVE COTISB-COTIDEP TO RETOURB-MCTDEP MOVE COTISB-COTISYN TO RETOURB-MCTSYN MOVE COTISB-COTICU TO RETOURB-MCTCU MOVE COTISB-MCOGE3 TO RETOURB-MCOGE3 MOVE COTISB-MCOTA3 TO RETOURB-MCOTA3 MOVE COTISB-COTITSEN TO RETOURB-MCBT13 MOVE COTISB-COTITSEN TO RETOURB-MCBT13 MOVE COTISB-MCBTSA TO RETOURB-MCBTSA MOVE COTISB-COTIS-OMI TO RETOURB-MVLTIM PERFORM VARYING IND FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL IND > 6 MOVE COTISB-GTAUOM TO RETOURB-GTAUOM MOVE COTISB-COTIS-OM TO RETOURB-MCTOM END-PERFORM MOVE W-TOTCOTOM TO RETOURB-TCTOM COMPUTE RETOURB-TCTHFR = W-TOTCOT3 + W-TOTCOT8 + W-TOTCOT9 MOVE COTISB-FA300 TO RETOURB-MFA300 MOVE COTISB-FN300 TO RETOURB-MFN300 MOVE COTISB-FA800 TO RETOURB-MFA800 MOVE COTISB-FN800 TO RETOURB-MFN800 MOVE COTISB-FA900 TO RETOURB-MFA900 MOVE COTISB-FN900 TO RETOURB-MFN900 COMPUTE RETOURB-TCTFRA = COTISB-FA300 + COTISB-FN300 + COTISB-FA800 + COTISB-FN800 + COTISB-FA900 + COTISB-FN900 COMPUTE RETOURB-TCTDU = RETOURB-TCTHFR + RETOURB-MFA300 + RETOURB-MFN300 + RETOURB-MFA800 + RETOURB-MFN800 + RETOURB-MFA900 + RETOURB-MFN900

       COMNONBA-MBJT13  NOT NUMERIC OR

column8:
IF CR NOT > ZERO
    EVALUATE TRUE ALSO TRUE ALSO TRUE ALSO TRUE
      WHEN COMNONBA-DAN     = TAU-R-JAN    ALSO
           COMNONBA-AC3DIR  = TAU-R-DEPDIR ALSO
           COMNONBA-CCOCOM  = TAU-R-CCOCOM ALSO
           COMNONBA-CCOIFP  = TAU-R-CCOIFP
                        CONTINUE
      WHEN OTHER
         IF   PARM = 'M'
             CALL 'EFITAUX2' USING
               COMNONBA-DAN
               COMNONBA-AC3DIR
               COMNONBA-CCOCOM
               COMNONBA-CCOIFP
               COMNONBA-CCPPER
               CR  RC
               ZES
             ON EXCEPTION MOVE 24 TO CR MOVE 01 TO RC
             END-CALL
        ELSE
             CALL 'FMSTAU2' USING
               COMNONBA-DAN
               COMNONBA-AC3DIR
               COMNONBA-CCOCOM
               COMNONBA-CCOIFP
               CR  RC
               ZES
             ON EXCEPTION MOVE 24 TO CR MOVE 01 TO RC
             END-CALL
             MOVE ZESTAUX       TO  TAU-R-ROL1
             MOVE TAU-R1-TAUTSE-NB TO  TAU-R1-TAUTSE-NB
             MOVE TAU-R1-PNBTGP    TO  TAU-R1-PNBTGP
             MOVE TAU-R-ROL1       TO  ZESTAUX
         END-IF
        MOVE ZESTAUX TO TAU-E-AN
        MOVE ZESTAUX TO TAU-D-DEP
        MOVE ZESTAUX TO TAU-C-COM
        MOVE ZESTAUX TO TAU-R-ROL
      END-EVALUATE
       MOVE COMNONBA-AIDFIC     TO     BASENB-CLE
                                       COTISNB-CLE
       MOVE COMNONBA-ANUPRO     TO     BASENB-ANUPRO
                                       COTISNB-ANUPRO
       MOVE COMNONBA-CCOBNB     TO     BASENB-ACODNB
                                       COTISNB-ACODNB
       MOVE  'I'   TO   BASENB-IMPOT COTISNB-IMPOT
       MOVE  'BN'  TO   BASENB-GNEXPS COTISNB-GNEXPS
       MOVE  TAU-R-TAUCOM-NB        TO   BASENB-TAUCOM
                                         COTISNB-TAUCOM
       MOVE  TAU-R-TAUSYNDSFP-NB    TO   BASENB-TAUSYN
                                         COTISNB-TAUSYN
       MOVE  TAU-R-TAUCUDFPVN-NB    TO   BASENB-TAUCU
                                         COTISNB-TAUCU
       MOVE  TAU-R-PNBGEM           TO   BASENB-TAUGEM
                                         COTISNB-TAUGEM
       MOVE  TAU-R-TAUTSE-NB        TO   BASENB-TAUTSEN
                                         COTISNB-TAUTSEN
       MOVE  TAU-R-PNBTGP           TO   BASENB-TAUTSEN
                                         COTISNB-TAUTSEN
       MOVE  TAU-R-PNBTXA           TO   BASENB-TAUTXADD
                                         COTISNB-TAUTXADD
       MOVE  TAU-D-TAUCHAGR-NB      TO   BASENB-TAUCHAGR
                                         COTISNB-TAUCHAGR
       MOVE  TAU-R-PNBCAA           TO   BASENB-TAUCAAA
                                         COTISNB-TAUCAAA
       MOVE  TAU-D-TAUSMAGR-NB      TO   BASENB-TAUSMAGR
                                         COTISNB-TAUSMAGR
       MOVE COMNONBA-MBACOM        TO   BASENB-BNBCOM
                                        COTISNB-BNBCOM
       MOVE COMNONBA-MBADEP        TO   BASENB-BNBDEP
                                        COTISNB-BNBDEP
       MOVE COMNONBA-MBASYN        TO   BASENB-BNBSYN
                                        COTISNB-BNBSYN
       MOVE COMNONBA-MBACU         TO   BASENB-BNBCU
                                        COTISNB-BNBCU
       MOVE COMNONBA-MBAGE3        TO   BASENB-BNBGEM
                                        COTISNB-BNBGEM
       MOVE COMNONBA-MBNT13     TO   BASENB-BNBTSEN
                                        COTISNB-BNBTSEN
       MOVE COMNONBA-MBNT13     TO   BASENB-BNBTSEN
                                        COTISNB-BNBTSEN
       MOVE COMNONBA-MBACA         TO   BASENB-BNBAGR
                                        COTISNB-BNBAGR
       MOVE COMNONBA-MBACAA        TO   BASENB-BNBCAA
                                        COTISNB-BNBCAA
       COMPUTE  COTISNB-COTICOM ROUNDED =
                COTISNB-BNBCOM * COTISNB-TAUCOM / 100
       COMPUTE  COTISNB-COTIDEP ROUNDED =
                COTISNB-BNBDEP * COTISNB-TAUTXADD / 100
       COMPUTE  COTISNB-COTISYN ROUNDED =
                COTISNB-BNBSYN * COTISNB-TAUSYN / 100
       COMPUTE  COTISNB-COTICU ROUNDED =
                COTISNB-BNBCU * COTISNB-TAUCU / 100
       COMPUTE  COTISNB-MCOGE3  ROUNDED =
                COTISNB-BNBGEM * COTISNB-TAUGEM / 100
       COMPUTE  COTISNB-COTITSEN ROUNDED =
            COTISNB-BNBTSEN * COTISNB-TAUTSEN / 100
       COMPUTE  COTISNB-COTITSEN ROUNDED =
            COTISNB-BNBTSEN * COTISNB-TAUTSEN / 100
       COMPUTE  COTISNB-MCNTSA ROUNDED =
            COTISNB-COTITSEN + COTISNB-COTITSEN
       COMPUTE  COTISNB-COTISMAG ROUNDED =
            COTISNB-BNBAGR * COTISNB-TAUSMAGR / 100
       COMPUTE  COTISNB-COTIAGR ROUNDED =
            COTISNB-BNBAGR * COTISNB-TAUCHAGR / 100
       IF COTISNB-CCODEP  = '57'
          IF COTISNB-BNBCAA > 0
             IF COTISNB-BNBCAA < W-LIMBASCAAA-P
                 CONTINUE
             ELSE
                 MOVE W-DFIXCAAA-P TO COTISNB-DFIXCAA
             END-IF
          END-IF
          IF COTISNB-BNBCAA NEGATIVE
             IF COTISNB-BNBCAA > W-LIMBASCAAA-N
                 CONTINUE
             ELSE
                 MOVE W-DFIXCAAA-N TO COTISNB-DFIXCAA
             END-IF
          END-IF
       END-IF
       IF COTISNB-TAUCAAA NOT = 0
          COMPUTE  COTISNB-DPROCAA ROUNDED =
                COTISNB-BNBCAA * COTISNB-TAUCAAA / 100
       END-IF
       COMPUTE W-TOTCOT3 = COTISNB-COTICOM
                             + COTISNB-COTICU
                             + COTISNB-COTIDEP
                             + COTISNB-MCOGE3
       COMPUTE W-TOTCOT8 = COTISNB-COTISYN
                             + COTISNB-COTIAGR
       COMPUTE W-TOTCOT9 = COTISNB-COTITSEN
                             + COTISNB-COTITSEN
       COMPUTE  COTISNB-FA300  ROUNDED   =
                W-TOTCOT3 * W-F300ARN
       COMPUTE  W-FRAIS-A-REPARTIR ROUNDED   =
                W-TOTCOT3 * W-F300FRS
       COMPUTE  COTISNB-FN300            =
                W-FRAIS-A-REPARTIR  -  COTISNB-FA300
       COMPUTE  COTISNB-FA800  ROUNDED   =
                W-TOTCOT8 * W-F800ARN
       COMPUTE  W-FRAIS-A-REPARTIR ROUNDED   =
                W-TOTCOT8 * W-F800FRS
       COMPUTE  COTISNB-FN800            =
                W-FRAIS-A-REPARTIR  -  COTISNB-FA800
       COMPUTE  COTISNB-FA900  ROUNDED   =
                W-TOTCOT9 * W-F900ARN
       COMPUTE  W-FRAIS-A-REPARTIR ROUNDED   =
                W-TOTCOT9 * W-F900FRS
       COMPUTE  COTISNB-FN900            =
                W-FRAIS-A-REPARTIR  -  COTISNB-FA900
       IF COTISNB-FA800 < COTISNB-FN800
          ADD      1 TO   COTISNB-FA800
          SUBTRACT 1 FROM COTISNB-FN800
       END-IF
       IF COTISNB-FA900 < COTISNB-FN900
          ADD      1 TO   COTISNB-FA900
          SUBTRACT 1 FROM COTISNB-FN900
       END-IF
       COMPUTE  COTISNB-FARC     ROUNDED   =
                COTISNB-DPROCAA  *  W-FARCAAA
       COMPUTE  W-FRAIS-A-REPARTIR  ROUNDED   =
                COTISNB-DPROCAA *  W-FPROCAAA
       COMPUTE  COTISNB-FRNVC              =
                W-FRAIS-A-REPARTIR   -  COTISNB-FARC
       IF COMNONBA-MBJCOM  NOT = 0 OR
          COMNONBA-MBJSYN  NOT = 0 OR
          COMNONBA-MBJCU   NOT = 0 OR
          COMNONBA-MBJECO  NOT = 0 OR
          COMNONBA-MBJESY  NOT = 0 OR
          COMNONBA-MBJEIC  NOT = 0
         MOVE COMNONBA-AIDFIC     TO   BASENB-CLE
                                       COTISNB-CLE
         MOVE COMNONBA-ANUPRO     TO   BASENB-ANUPRO
                                       COTISNB-ANUPRO
         MOVE COMNONBA-CCOBNB     TO   BASENB-ACODNB
                                       COTISNB-ACODNB
         MOVE  'G'      TO   BASENB-IMPOT  COTISNB-IMPOT
         MOVE  'JA'     TO   BASENB-GNEXPS COTISNB-GNEXPS
         MOVE   COMNONBA-MBJCOM  TO  BASENB-BNBCOM
                                     COTISNB-BNBCOM
         MOVE   COMNONBA-MBJSYN  TO  BASENB-BNBSYN
                                     COTISNB-BNBSYN
         MOVE   COMNONBA-MBJCU   TO  BASENB-BNBCU
                                     COTISNB-BNBCU
         MOVE   COMNONBA-MBJECO  TO  BASENB-MBJECO
                                     COTISNB-MBJECO
         MOVE   COMNONBA-MBJESY  TO  BASENB-MBJESY
                                     COTISNB-MBJESY
         MOVE   COMNONBA-MBJEIC  TO  BASENB-MBJEIC
                                     COTISNB-MBJEIC
          COMPUTE  COTISNB-COTICOM ROUNDED =
                   COTISNB-BNBCOM * COTISNB-TAUCOM / 100
          COMPUTE  COTISNB-COTISYN ROUNDED =
                   COTISNB-BNBSYN * COTISNB-TAUSYN / 100
          COMPUTE  COTISNB-COTICU ROUNDED =
                   COTISNB-BNBCU * COTISNB-TAUCU / 100
          COMPUTE  COTISNB-MCNJCO ROUNDED =
                   COTISNB-MBJECO * COTISNB-TAUCOM / 100
          COMPUTE  COTISNB-MCNJSY ROUNDED =
                   COTISNB-MBJESY * COTISNB-TAUSYN / 100
          COMPUTE  COTISNB-MCNJIC ROUNDED =
                   COTISNB-MBJEIC * COTISNB-TAUCU / 100
          COMPUTE  COTISNB-MCNJAE = COTISNB-MCNJCO +
                                        COTISNB-MCNJSY +
                                        COTISNB-MCNJIC
          COMPUTE W-TOTCOT3  =  COTISNB-COTICOM +
                                     COTISNB-COTICU +
                                     COTISNB-MCNJCO +
                                     COTISNB-MCNJIC

          COMPUTE  COTISNB-MCNJCO ROUNDED =
                   COTISNB-MBJECO * COTISNB-TAUCOM / 100
          COMPUTE  COTISNB-MCNJSY ROUNDED =
                   COTISNB-MBJESY * COTISNB-TAUSYN / 100
          COMPUTE  COTISNB-MCNJIC ROUNDED =
                   COTISNB-MBJEIC * COTISNB-TAUCU / 100
          COMPUTE  COTISNB-MCNJAE = COTISNB-MCNJCO +
                                        COTISNB-MCNJSY +
                                        COTISNB-MCNJIC
          COMPUTE W-TOTCOT3  =  COTISNB-COTICOM +
                                     COTISNB-COTICU +
                                     COTISNB-MCNJCO +
                                     COTISNB-MCNJIC
          COMPUTE W-TOTCOT8  =  COTISNB-COTISYN +
                                     COTISNB-MCNJSY
          COMPUTE  COTISNB-MFAJAE ROUNDED   =
            ( W-TOTCOT3 * W-F300ARN )  +
            ( W-TOTCOT8 * W-F800ARN )
          COMPUTE  W-FRAIS-A-REPARTIR ROUNDED   =
            ( W-TOTCOT3 * W-F300FRS )  +
            ( W-TOTCOT8 * W-F800FRS )
          COMPUTE  COTISNB-MFNJAE ROUNDED   =
             W-FRAIS-A-REPARTIR  -  COTISNB-MFAJAE
       END-IF

column4: PERFORM VARYING I FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL I > N IF V1 = NODE1 THEN MOVE V2 TO NODE2 MOVE 0 TO VISITED IF FUNCTION ORD > FUNCTION ORD THEN PERFORM VARYING J FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL J > LEN IF Q-V = NODE2 THEN MOVE 1 TO VISITED END-IF END-PERFORM END-IF IF VISITED = 0 THEN ADD 1 TO Q2 COMPUTE Q-LEN = LEN + 1 PERFORM VARYING J FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL J > LEN MOVE Q-V TO Q-V END-PERFORM MOVE NODE2 TO Q-V END-IF END-IF END-PERFORM
column8:
IF NODE1 = 'end' THEN
        ADD 1 TO RESULT
      ELSE
        PERFORM VARYING I FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL I > N
          IF V1 = NODE1 THEN
            MOVE V2 TO NODE2
            MOVE 0 TO VISITED
            IF FUNCTION ORD > FUNCTION ORD THEN
              PERFORM VARYING J FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL J > LEN
                IF Q-V = NODE2 THEN
                  MOVE 1 TO VISITED
                END-IF
              END-PERFORM
            END-IF
            IF VISITED = 0 THEN
              ADD 1 TO Q2
              COMPUTE Q-LEN = LEN + 1
              PERFORM VARYING J FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL J > LEN
                MOVE Q-V TO Q-V
              END-PERFORM
              MOVE NODE2 TO Q-V
            END-IF
          END-IF

column4: INITIALIZE WS-NEXT-MOVE DISPLAY BOARD-SCREEN END-DISPLAY ACCEPT BOARD-SCREEN END-ACCEPT EVALUATE FUNCTION UPPER-CASE WHEN "A" SET WS-ROW TO 1 WHEN "B" SET WS-ROW TO 2 WHEN "C" SET WS-ROW TO 3 WHEN OTHER MOVE "FAIL" TO WS-MOVE-OUTCOME END-EVALUATE SET WS-COL TO WS-NEXT-MOVE IF WS-MOVE-OUTCOME IS NOT EQUAL TO "FAIL" AND WS-COL IS GREATER THAN 0 AND WS-COL IS LESS THAN 4 AND WS-CELL = " " THEN MOVE WS-PLAYER TO WS-CELL ELSE MOVE "FAIL" TO WS-MOVE-OUTCOME END-IF
column8:
IF COMPUTER-PLAYER
            INITIALIZE WS-COMPUTER-MOVED
            PERFORM UNTIL COMPUTER-MOVED
                COMPUTE WS-ROW = FUNCTION RANDOM * 3 + 1
                END-COMPUTE
                COMPUTE WS-COL = FUNCTION RANDOM * 3 + 1
                END-COMPUTE
                IF WS-CELL IS EQUAL TO " "
                THEN
                    SET WS-COMPUTER-MOVED TO 1
                    MOVE WS-PLAYER TO WS-CELL
                END-IF
            END-PERFORM
        ELSE
            INITIALIZE WS-NEXT-MOVE
            DISPLAY BOARD-SCREEN END-DISPLAY
            ACCEPT BOARD-SCREEN END-ACCEPT
            EVALUATE FUNCTION UPPER-CASE
                WHEN "A" SET WS-ROW TO 1
                WHEN "B" SET WS-ROW TO 2
                WHEN "C" SET WS-ROW TO 3
                WHEN OTHER MOVE "FAIL" TO WS-MOVE-OUTCOME
            END-EVALUATE
            SET WS-COL TO WS-NEXT-MOVE
            IF
                WS-MOVE-OUTCOME IS NOT EQUAL TO "FAIL"
                AND WS-COL IS GREATER THAN 0
                AND WS-COL IS LESS THAN 4
                AND WS-CELL = " "
            THEN
                MOVE WS-PLAYER TO WS-CELL
            ELSE
                MOVE "FAIL" TO WS-MOVE-OUTCOME
            END-IF
        END-IF
column12: INITIALIZE WS-COMPUTER-MOVED PERFORM UNTIL COMPUTER-MOVED COMPUTE WS-ROW = FUNCTION RANDOM * 3 + 1 END-COMPUTE COMPUTE WS-COL = FUNCTION RANDOM * 3 + 1 END-COMPUTE IF WS-CELL IS EQUAL TO " " THEN SET WS-COMPUTER-MOVED TO 1 MOVE WS-PLAYER TO WS-CELL END-IF END-PERFORM
